parityMeta.describes: iOS-17e-4 loadFeedbackEngine parity — collectLoadFeedback ordering/filtering + buildLoadFeedbackSummary. History carries loadFeedback for bench-press and squat across several sessions, plus a dataFlag='test' and a dataFlag='excluded' session that MUST be dropped. Probes pin: global collect (slice 20) with mixed exercises; bench-press collect (slice 5) with a too_light/good/too_heavy tie => dominant 'too_light' (stable insertion order) and a 'good'-branch adjustment; squat collect; and a no-match probe => total 0, dominantFeedback undefined, default 'normal' adjustment. FUNCTION-LEVEL compute-assert on the Swift side.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: test/excluded sessions dropped by collectLoadFeedback's dataFlag filter; sortRecent orders by date desc; counts tie => too_light wins on stable sort.
